headline: 暑期新片乏力，老IP霸榜
headlineEn: Summer Box Office Sluggish, Old IPs Dominate
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周仅2部新片。热门趋势由《痴迷》《鬼上车》等领跑，《福尔摩斯小姐3》《玩具总动员5》等续集持续霸榜。
summaryEn: No new movies released today, only 2 this week. Trending titles include 'Obsession' and 'Ghost Ride', while sequels like 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'Toy Story 5' dominate the weekly chart.

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周热度飙升，有望冲击票房纪录。
industryHighlights.en: 'Enola Holmes 3' surges in popularity this week, poised to break box office records.

industryHighlights.text: 《小黄人与大怪兽》衍生剧筹备中，预计2027年上线。
industryHighlights.en: A 'Minions vs. Monsters' spin-off series is in development, targeting a 2027 release.

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》第二季定档2027年初，预告片引发热议。
industryHighlights.en: 'Silo' Season 2 set for early 2027, trailer sparks online buzz.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》新海报曝光，多元宇宙元素再升级。
industryHighlights.en: New poster for 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' reveals enhanced multiverse elements.
